name: Egg Whites Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the 7 egg whites and place them in a large bowl.
2. Whisk the egg whites until they become frothy but still hold their shape when the whisk is lifted.
3. Gradually add 2 tablespoons (tbsp) of sugar to the beaten egg whites, continuing to whisk after each addition until the mixture is smooth and glossy.
4. Add cream of tartar to the bowl and mix well to combine with the egg white mixture.
5. Grease a tube pan lightly with butter or cooking spray.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and place it in a preheated oven set to 350°F (175°C).
7. Cover the top of the pan with aluminum foil and bake for 15 minutes, or until the pudding is firm to the touch.
8. Remove from the oven and allow to cool at room temperature before unmolding onto a serving plate.
Toppings: creme anglaise, coconut cream, apricot compote
